review.summary: Exploratory review found transcript navigation confusing for first-time operators.
review.recommended_next_step: Hold broad UX concerns for operator review before filing.

findings.summary: Transcript navigation is hard to understand
findings.details: The page is functionally intact but the route structure is not self-evident.
findings.expected: A first-time operator can discover transcript controls without guidance.
findings.actual: The operator must infer which tab and packet selection state matters.
findings.why_it_matters: Operators can stall before reaching the most important mission evidence.

issue_proposals.title: Clarify transcript navigation language
issue_proposals.summary: Exploratory acceptance found the transcript area conceptually confusing but not broken.
repro_steps: Attempt to understand packet selection without prior context
issue_proposals.actual: Operator must infer the intended flow.
issue_proposals.why_it_matters: The first useful evidence step should be obvious to a first-time operator.
issue_proposals.hold_reason: Exploratory UX critique should be reviewed before filing.

campaign.goal: Dogfood the operator console as a first-time operator.
stop_conditions: stop when the route budget is exhausted
stop when no adjacent surface adds new operator evidence
